summary: Landing page project with sections including Contact and Exclusive Pre-Launch. User reporting a visual issue with black background/area above the Exclusive Pre-Launch section.
known_issues: Black background/area above the Exclusive Pre-Launch section is visually broken or misaligned

existing_features.title: Fix the visual issue where a black background area bleeds into or overlaps the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge/section in the Navigation component. Ensure the area directly above the Pre-Launch badge is visually clean and consistent with the surrounding navbar styling — no unwanted black blocks, gaps, or misaligned backgrounds should appear.

projectName: Fix black background bleed above Exclusive Pre-Launch badge in Navigation
